title: Red_Absorb 16x
body:
Red_absorb 16x is a bold PvP texture pack built for Bedwars players on Minecraft 1.8.9 who want their gameplay to stand out—visually and strategically. With its striking red theme and simplified 16x resolution, it keeps your performance smooth and your battles blazing.

🎮 Smooth performance: optimized for PvP, keeping frame rates high and gameplay sharp

🔴 Vibrant palette: red hues dominate the visuals, creating a fiery and unforgettable aesthetic

🛏️ Tailored for Bedwars: every texture is crafted to give you tactical clarity and style

✨ Signature look: the first custom release by reddoxgod, made to leave its mark
